name: Prompt Coach SUPREME
title: Prompt Coach SUPREME — Copilot Prompt Engineering & Experience Optimization Agent
shortDescription: A practical agent that helps you create, analyze, and improve prompts for Copilot. Recommends the best Copilot experience (Chat, in-app, Cowork, SharePoint, Scout), designs multi-stage plans, estimates costs, and selects optimal models.
longDescription: Prompt Coach SUPREME is a Microsoft 365 Copilot agent designed to make you a better prompt engineer and Copilot user.

It helps you create prompts from scratch, improve existing prompts, troubleshoot problems, select the right Copilot experience (Chat, in-app, Copilot Cowork, Copilot in SharePoint, Microsoft Scout) for any task, design staged plans across multiple tools, estimate costs for metered experiences, and choose the optimal model.
Whether you're building a single prompt or planning a complex multi-stage project, Prompt Coach SUPREME provides practical, grounded recommendations focused on achieving your goal efficiently.

references.name: Use the Learning Coach template to build an agent
Write effective prompts to achieve optimal results
